## How to test

- [ ] `pnpm dlx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] Smoke-tested on at least one real launchd agent
- [ ] Smoke-tested on at least one real cloud trigger (if cloud pane touched)
- [ ] Manually verified on a viewport ≤ 640px
